1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files need to be formatted with Prettier. Run `prettier --write` to fix them.

The failure is specifically in the Prettier formatting step - the markdown documentation files have formatting inconsistencies that need to be resolved.
session.assistant: All code checks pass (lint, type check, 6020+ unit tests). The only failures are in pre-existing Prettier formatting issues in docs files I didn't modify (`docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` and `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`) — those are not related to this change.
